title: REQUISITE NEEDS Wooden Coat Hangers 40 Pack With 360 Degree Rotatory Hook Strong Shoulder Notches Wardrobe Wooden Garments Hangers Made By Natural Wood and Non-Slip Trouser bar (Pack of 40)
features: HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL: Made of selected maple wood, high density and high load ratings, stable and durable
CHORME PLATED PROCESS: With the chromium plated and 360°swivel hook, it is beautiful, anti-rust, durable, convenient and flexible in use
DESIGN OF GROOVE: 2 grooves on the shoulders, which can hang tank tops without slipping
100% SATISFACTION: We are always available to provide a friendly customer service before and after your purchase, so please don't wait and just enjoy it right now!

EXTRA WIDE SHOULDER DESIGN : The wide shoulder design of the coat hangers provides ample support to your suits, coats and other kinds of clothes, distribute garment weight evenly and preserves collars and drape to ensure suits and coats maintain their tailor-made shape.
description: Product Description SET OF 40 WOODEN HANGERS These beautiful wooden hangers are made of all-natural wood The hook is made of metal and can be rotated 360 degrees for ease of hanging. Shoulder notches add a neat feature to hand tops with thin straps. The design is so organically shaped that you never have shoulder bumps. 360 spinning hook makes it easy to your clothes in any position. Made of beautifully aged and polished wood. Hangers are made of 90% recycled material CHROME PLATED PROCESS With the chromium-plated and 360°swivel hook, it is beautiful, anti-rust, durable, convenient, and flexible in use EXTRA WIDE SHOULDER DESIGN The wide shoulder design of the coat hangers provides ample support to your suits, coats and other kinds of clothes, distribute garment weight evenly, and preserves collars and drape to ensure suits and coats maintain their tailor-made shape DESIGN OF GROOVE 2 grooves on the shoulders, which can hang tank tops without slipping Made of selected maple wood, high density and high load ratings, stable and durable All hand made for the best performance.
